Title: User registration with valid data
Test Data:
- Name: John Doe
- Email: john.doe@example.com
- Password: password123
- Confirm Password: password123
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the required data.
3. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The user is successfully registered, and the system displays a confirmation message.

Title: User registration with invalid email
Test Data:
- Name: John Doe
- Email: john.doe
- Password: password123
- Confirm Password: password123
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the required data with an invalid email.
3. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The system displays an error message indicating that the email is invalid.

Title: User registration with mismatched passwords
Test Data:
- Name: John Doe
- Email: john.doe@example.com
- Password: password123
- Confirm Password: password124
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the required data with mismatched passwords.
3. Click the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The system displays an error message indicating that the passwords do not match.

Title: Book reservation with available book
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the book details page.
2. Select the "Reserve" button for the book.
3. Confirm the reservation.
Expected Result: The book is reserved for the user, and the system displays a confirmation message.

Title: Book reservation with unavailable book
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the book details page.
2. Select the "Reserve" button for the book.
Expected Result: The system displays an error message indicating that the book is not available for reservation.

Title: Book return with returned book
Preconditions: A user is logged in and has a book reserved.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user's account page.
2. Select the "Return" button for the reserved book.
3. Confirm the return.
Expected Result: The book is returned, and the system displays a confirmation message.

Title: Book return with unreturned book
Preconditions: A user is logged in but does not have a book reserved.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user's account page.
2. Select the "Return" button for any book.
Expected Result: The system displays an error message indicating that the user does not have a book to return.
